calendar.matters:
Renotice Of Motion And Motion To Vacaate Renewal Of Judgment
Off Calendar Sep-10-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEAR: Peter J. Veiguela, Esq. 818/501-3800 for pltf & opposing party; Eric S. Clarke, Esq. 925/944-6080 for deft & opposing party Sylvia Chan.
RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling (APPLICATION FOR RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT IS GRANTED - COURT CLERK SHOULD HAVE PROMPTLY RETURNED PAPERS WHEN INCORRECT FILING FEE TENDERED). (AJR/JH)

Renotice Of Motion And Motion To Vacaate Renewal Of Judgment
Off Calendar Jul-29-2002 Continued To Sep-10-02 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: APPEAR: Martina A. Rider, Esq. 818/501-3800 for opposing party Bank of America; Eric S. Clarke, Esq. 925/944-6080 for moving party Sylvia Chan.
RULING: Argued and the Court sets aside Judge Chiantelli's order without prejudice. Court sets a hearing re renewal of judgment for 09/10/02. Bank to file reapplication by 08/15; deft's opposition due 08/27; reply due 09/04. Deft to prepare order. (AJR/JH)

(Ntc) And Mtn To Vacate Renewal Of Judgment
